description: CompositionGreen round neck T-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, has fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, short sleeves and brand logo below the nape of the neckFittingRegularWash careWash in cold waterDry in shadeIron on reverse of designHave you ever wondered how the most popular villain of our epics used to juggle all his ten heads? Your T-shirt educates you more on Ravan - the phenomenon! Pair this T-shirt with denims and canvas shoes for a great casual look, and revel in the comfort of this cotton fabric.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
